news.paragraph: Meta is currently facing multiple regulatory challenges, including a legal setback in Italy and increased EU scrutiny over child safety and competition. The company is also managing internal friction from employee protests and reported tensions regarding its AI-driven direction. These legal and organizational developments serve as significant catalysts that traders should monitor for potential volatility.
headlines: Meta, DESRI Report 850 MW of Power Purchase Agreements
Meta seeks to avoid EU fine with free WhatsApp access for rival AI chatbots
Meta Platforms Loses Court Battle Against Italy's Communications Regulator
Meta Platforms, TikTok, X in EU Crosshairs Over Child Safety
Exclusive-Meta employees launch protest against mouse-tracking tech at US offices
Meta’s AI crisis deepens: Inside the fight against Mark Zuckerberg
